title: Bucky barnes x dean winchester: slice of life
author: RaurberryXD
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary:
A shitty story about dean winchester and bucky barnes adopting 2 kids named kobik and avenue, with there friend Crowley
I want to put here that avenue is high autistic needs, if I do anything wrong or disrespect i want you to tell me if im accidentally being ablist , im not trying to be, i wanted to expand my writing but also you never see characters on higher spectrum of anything, lack of disability representation, so I want to change that , even if it just small story
